backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Fragrance.Intl marketplace backend, defining data types and state for stores, products, orders, carts, payouts, and transactions, and mixing in authorization, blob storage, and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the vendor approval flow fix (ApprovalDashboard + useQueries) to its relevant components and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (including auctions and trade offers) and wraps them in a layout with Header, Footer, profile setup modal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Admin component that lists vendor approval requests and provides approve/reject buttons, calling the useSetApproval mutation with toast notifications for success and error states and per-row loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel component that displays all auctions in a sortable table with options to cancel or finalize each auction, including status badges and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel component that lists all orders in a filterable table by status, allowing admins to update individual order statuses via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel component for managing vendor payouts and editing the platform commission rate, displaying payouts in a table with status update controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small presentational component that renders a color-coded badge for a given payout status (pending, processing, completed, failed).
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Admin form component that accepts a principal ID and role selection to assign a user role via the useAssignRole mutation, with toast feedback on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel component that displays all trade offers in a sortable table with status badges and a cancel action button for each offer.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Card component for displaying a single auction's title, description, pricing, status badge, and a live countdown timer, with a button to navigate to the auction detail page.
A React countdown timer component that calculates and displays time remaining until an auction ends, updating every second. Supports both compact (inline) and full (block) display modes.
Renders a responsive grid of AuctionCard components, showing skeleton placeholders while loading and an empty-state message when no auctions exist.
Displays a color-coded badge for an auction's status (active, ended, or canceled) using predefined Tailwind color variants.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: A form component that allows authenticated users to place a bid on an active auction, enforcing a minimum bid amount and showing success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a scrollable, time-sorted list of bids for an auction, showing bidder address, amount, and timestamp for each entry.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to complete profile setup, blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: A popover cart icon in the navbar that shows the item count badge and a preview of cart contents with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, quantity, unit price, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Displays an order summary sidebar with per-item line totals, a subtotal, and a checkout button that is disabled when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Shows a checkout review panel listing order items, shipping address, and total, with a Stripe payment button that displays a loading state while redirecting.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: A controlled/uncontrolled form component for collecting a shipping address (street, city, state, zip, country) with a skip option for digital/service-only orders.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A simple access-denied UI component displaying a shield icon, a configurable message, and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand logo, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart dropdown, and a user profile dropdown that adapts based on authentication, vendor approval, and admin status.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Renders a color-coded badge for a given order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled).
Displays a horizontal step timeline of order stages with completed, current, and future states, plus a special canceled indicator.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Card component for a single product showing image, title, type badge, description, price, and an add-to-cart button with stock and loading states.
Responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components, with skeleton loading placeholders and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Renders a row of filter controls (keyword search, category, product type, sort order) for the product listing, with a reset button that clears all active filters.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: Form component that lets a user submit a counter trade offer by specifying a cash adjustment and optional note, swapping the original offer's items in the process.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: Form for creating a new trade offer with dynamic lists of offered and requested items, a cash adjustment, a note, and a target principal field.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Displays a single trade offer's details (items, cash adjustment, note, status) and provides accept, reject, cancel, and counter action buttons based on perspective and offer status.
Renders a list of TradeOfferCard components with loading skeletons and an empty-state message when no offers are present.
Standalone badge component that displays a color-coded trade offer status (pending, accepted, rejected, canceled, countered).
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: Form for vendors to create a new auction by entering a title, optional product ID and description, starting price, and end time, with validation before submission.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: A form component for creating or updating a product, handling fields like title, price, category, and product type, with validation and toast notifications on submit.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Displays a vendor's product list with options to add, edit, or delete products, using a dialog to host the ProductForm and showing loading skeletons while fetching.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreForm: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a store, with fields for name, description, and contact info, supporting both create and update mutations.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreList: Manages a vendor's list of stores (up to 5), allowing creation, editing, and toggling active status, with loading skeletons and a tooltip when the store limit is reached.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreProd: Manages products within a specific store, providing an inline form and table UI for adding, editing, and deleting store products with permission-aware error handling.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreSele: A dropdown selector component that lets vendors switch between their stores, displaying each store's active/inactive status as a badge.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions list with live countdown timers, cancel functionality, and a collapsible form to create new auctions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Renders a sortable table of a vendor's past transactions showing order details, gross amount, commission, and net payout with a link to each receipt.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows a vendor's payout history in a table along with summary cards for total earned and pending amounts, using status badges for each payout.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Form component that allows a vendor to edit and save their store profile fields (name, description, contact) via the updateVendorProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: Multi-field registration form for new vendors to create a store profile with optional logo upload, then submits an approval request to the admin.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including user profiles, roles, approvals, products, cart, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a luxury fragrance-themed CSS variable palette for light/dark modes, and adds print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders panels for vendor approvals, role assignment, order management, payouts, auctions, and trade offers, gating access by identity and admin role.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single auction showing pricing, a live countdown timer, bid form, and bid history, fetched by auction ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Page that lists all active auctions in a grid layout, fetched via the useListActiveAuctions query hook.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with product details and a summary/checkout section, showing an empty state when the cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout page that collects a shipping address and then shows an order review before initiating a Stripe checkout session and redirecting the user to Stripe.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, three feature highlights, and a grid of up to 8 featured products fetched by popularity.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Displays a sorted list of the current user's past orders with status badges, totals, and navigation links to order detail and receipt pages.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Simple page that wraps the NewTradeOfferForm component with a header and back-navigation link for creating a new trade offer.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that fetches an order by ID and displays a success icon, status timeline, item list, and total, with links to orders and receipt.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Printable order receipt page that fetches order and transaction data, displaying invoice details, shipping address, line items, and a print button.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Static page shown when a Stripe payment is cancelled, informing the user they were not charged and providing links back to the cart and product listing.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Handles the Stripe payment success redirect by confirming the payment via session ID, displaying order details, and auto-redirecting to the order page after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders the product listing page with search/filter controls and a product grid, fetching products based on the current filter state.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Displays the current user's incoming and outgoing trade offers in separate tabs, with a button to create new trade offers.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Vendor dashboard page showing store selector, quick stats, store management, store products, order history, payouts, and auctions panels for approved vendors.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor product management page that gates access behind identity and approval checks, then renders the ProductListManager for the stored vendor ID.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Vendor registration page that shows a registration form for unapproved users, a pending state after submission, and a dashboard link for already-approved vendors.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript types and enums for the frontend, including Product, Order, Auction, TradeOffer, Payout, and related status/filter types mirroring the Motoko backend.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Provides utility functions for Stripe Checkout integration, including building success/cancel redirect URLs and parsing the checkout session response from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including gold, cream, bronze, sidebar), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request for the vendor approval flow, with one existing frontend fix feature and one pending backend fix task (AR-1) to correctly persist vendor approval status.
